'''Daslkehnt''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
The [[Jrahl Ferrin]] gang performed criminal activities on Daslkehnt before [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], when [[Rei'Kas]] the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] was a member.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]''
